2606.16845.title: Robust Dual-Signal Fusion: Hybrid Neuro-Symbolic Gating with Compressed Chain-of-Thought Refinement for Irony Detection in Social Media Texts
2606.16845.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) natively default to literal semantic interpretations, making zero-shot irony detection a persistent challenge. We introduce the Robust Dual-Signal (RDS) Fusion framework, a hybrid neuro-symbolic architecture that compresses Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning trajectories without Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Evaluated on a strictly held-out TweetEval test set (N=734), RDS achieves 78.1% accuracy and a Macro F1 of 0.777, matching the absolute performance ceiling of the fine-tuned BERTweet. On the heavily imbalanced iSarcasm dataset, the frozen CoT pipeline filters 22.5% of out-of-distribution hallucinations, yielding a zero-shot Macro F1 of 0.6726 and Ironic F1 of 0.4821, outperforming multiple heavily supervised SemEval transformer ensembles. A statistical ablation confirms this structural synergy: adding the symbolic prior to the neural baseline yields no significant gain (p = 0.242), and the marginal benefit of adding the CoT pipeline to that prior is heavily compressed (p = 0.149). Only the complete, concurrent fusion of all three signals achieves a statistically validated improvement over the baseline (p = 0.005).
2606.16845.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）本質上默認為字面語義解釋，使得零樣本諷刺檢測成為一個持續的挑戰。<lb/>我們引入了穩健雙信號（RDS）融合框架，這是一種混合神經符號架構，可以在不進行監督微調（SFT）的情況下壓縮思維鏈（CoT）推理軌跡。<lb/>在嚴格保留的TweetEval測試集（N=734）上進行評估，RDS達到了78.1%的準確率和0.777的宏觀F1，與微調的BERTweet的絕對性能上限相匹配。<lb/>在嚴重不平衡的iSarcasm數據集上，凍結的CoT管道過濾了22.5%的分佈外幻覺，產生了0.6726的零樣本宏觀F1和0.4821的諷刺F1，超越了多個重度監督的SemEvalTransformer集成。<lb/>統計消融確認了這一結構協同作用：將符號先驗添加到神經基線並未帶來顯著增益（p = 0.242），而將CoT管道添加到該先驗的邊際效益則被大幅壓縮（p = 0.149）。<lb/>只有所有三個信號的完整、同時融合才能在統計上實現對基線的改善（p = 0.005）。
2606.16845.author: Ankit Bhattacharjee et.al.
